content:
🔥 Cosmos-Server | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Securing and simplifying the management of self-hosted applications on a home server.
✨ Key Features: • App Store for easy installation and management • Storage Manager with Parity Disks and MergerFS • Network Storages based on RClone • Reverse-Proxy with automatic HTTPS • Authentication Server with MFA and multiple strategies
📖 Summary: Cosmos is a self-hosted home server solution designed to enhance the security and ease of managing personal applications. It acts as a secure gateway and server manager, offering features like an app store, storage management, reverse proxy, and authentication server to protect self-hosted services.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
